title: azure-kv Cargo.toml repository URL typo: 'secretsx' not 'secretx'
description: secretx-azure-kv/Cargo.toml line 11 has repository = 'https://github.com/MarkAtwood/crate-secretsx'. All other 14 crates use 'crate-secretx' (no trailing 's'). The typo is in published crates.io metadata, not code, so it causes no runtime failure. But it points to a non-existent repo for that crate's metadata page.
